## Your question

Be specific. "How do I train a new adapter for the sensor codec?" beats "how do adapters
work?" — we can always expand the answer, but a narrow question gets a faster answer.

## Is this a docs gap?

If you think the answer belongs in README / docs / quickstart, say so — we treat "this

change via PR directly.
